titleStmt.title: SII 27.428: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 428. (A.R. No. 566 of 1929-30.) HATTIYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 4) set up in prākāra of the Lokanāthēśvara temple.

This registers a gift of land to god Lōkanātha of Haṭi-Añgaḍi by the dēśa-samasta of Hāḍu-nāḍu for conducting the tuḍubina-utsava. The gift land, situated at Bāḷāḍi, was made over to the god through Rāmābhaṭṭa. Sēnabōva Kaseṭṭi wrote the record.
It is dated Śaka 1[5]02, Pramādhi, Vaiśākha ba. 10, Wednesday corresponding to 1579 A.D., May 20.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . tayilōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī vijeyādbhuda
ya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1502 neya pramādhi saṁvatsarada va
yiśākha ba 10 budhavāradalū śrīmattu haṭiAṁgaḍiya lō
kanāthadēvara divyaśrīpādapadmaṁgaḷige hāḍunāḍu dēśasamastaru rā
mābhaṭṭara muṁdiṭṭu śāṁṣṭāṁgaveragi pūḍavaṁṭu dēvara bhaṁḍāra
kke koṭṭa dānadhārāpūrvakada dharma sādhanada paṭiya vakhaṇiya krama
veṁteṁdare lōkanāthadēvara tuḍubina Utsahake kayimada maṁdina voḷaguḷa
bāḷāḍiya beṭina bāḷa catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu keṁcanūravara
holana yettida Agaḷa tōḍiṁdaṁpaḍuvalu teṁkalu heddāriyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu keṁcanūravara badula gaddeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu baḍagalu keṁcanūravara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nālku catussī
meya voḷagaṇa bayalu mu 10 mekki mu 4 makki mu 6 mattaṁbaya
lu mu 2 ra catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu kecanūravara gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gaḷiyārana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
saṁdu gēriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu keṁcanūravara tōḍina
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu . yiṁtī nālku catussīmeyavoḷage bayalu
mu 2 Ubhayaṁ bayalu mu 12 mekkemu 4 makke mu 6 Aṁttu gadde mu
22 ke dalahakkalu haṭi manekaḷa AlliUḷa Anubha sanubhahalasu mū
lu Aḍake teṁgu voṭimeṇasu kaṁciniṁci Alliyēnuṁṭādahakku
lu haḍu nukkiya niḍi muṁtāda nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi
Āgāmi siddhasādhya Aṣṭabōgagaḷu yēnuṁṭādadanū lōkanātha dēvara sē
veya tuḍubina dharmmakke nāu samastarū voppikoṭṭeU Abāḷige vo
ppida teṟu kuḷakāṭiya lekkadalū ga 82 haṇavina kuḷa hadike bīḍige
Akara yēnuṁṭādadanū nāu nāḍu hāki hasarisikoṁḍu teṟu
U A dharṁmada bāḷamēle Āru AḷiU Aṁnyāyava māḍi
dare nāvēkaṭṭi nilisikoḍuveU Ā tuḍibina dharṁmavanu dinacari
yiṁdalū lōkanāthadēvara sēvayanu māḍi naḍadubahaṁtāgi bi
ṭṭa dharmaśāsanada paṭṭige sākṣigaḷu . Āditya caṁdra Anila Anauca
deU bhūvirāpu hrudeyayamaśca Ahaśca rātriśba Ubhēca saṁdhyē darṁma
sya jānādhi narasyaḻrattaṁ . dānapālanayōrmadyē dānātsrēyōnru pālanaṁ
nāḍa sēnabōva kaseṭṭiya barada
Digital edition of SII 27.428 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
